title: Meme stocks moving again? Yeah, it’s one of those weeks.
author: ExplanationNormal339
selftext:
You can feel it. Volume creeping up. BYND refusing to die. GME showing life. AMC pretending it’s 2021 again.

Everyone’s acting like they don’t care, but half the market’s got one eye on the tickers.  
One green candle and suddenly everyone’s a “long-term investor.”

If this week pops, it’s gonna be loud.

Watching BYND, GME, and COIN on [**aimytrade.io**](https://aimytrade.io?utm_source=chatgpt.com) — it’s getting spicy.
